blocks.label: Concrete Plinths

variables.label: Product type
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall propose the appropriate plinth product for the specified dimensions and application.

variables.label: Lengths (mm)
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall confirm maximum standard piece length and available modular lengths.

variables.label: Reinforcement
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall confirm the reinforcement design and provide calculations or reference to type-tested design.

variables.label: Colour/aggregate
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall propose colour and aggregate to match or complement adjacent panels. STM confirms on samples.

variables.label: Anchors
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall specify anchor type, positions, and load capacity. Anchors shall be compatible with the adjacent sandwich panel anchor system.

blocks.label: Cutouts & Openings in Plinths
blocks.text:
Cutouts in plinths: {{cutQty}} pieces, standard max {{cutMax}} m².

Per cutout: reinforcement at edges. Dagkant treatment: {{dagType}}.

The Supplier SHALL ensure structural integrity is maintained at all cutout locations and shall confirm maximum cutout dimensions without additional reinforcement.

Price: per cutout (standard) and per m1 dagkant.

blocks.label: Accessories & Anchors

variables.label: Anchor type
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall specify the anchor system and provide load tables.

blocks.label: Standards
blocks.text:
All plinths SHALL comply with at minimum:

- EN 14992 (Precast concrete products — Wall elements)
- EN 13369 (Common rules for precast concrete products)
- EN 206 (Concrete — specification, performance, production and conformity)
- NEN-EN 1992-1-1 (Eurocode 2 — Design of concrete structures)

Fire: EN 13501-2 min {{fireRes}} (where applicable to application).
Exposure: min class {{expCl}} as per EN 206 / EN 1992-1-1.

The Supplier SHALL hold CE marking (DoP) for the supplied elements.
Concrete production SHALL be from a BFBN-certified plant or equivalent.
Reinforcement certificates: EN 10080, 3.1 mill certificates required.

Attach: DoP, concrete mix design, fire classification, exposure class confirmation.

overrides.ch5_priceBreakdownItems:
Per m1 plinth (per height × thickness combination)
Per piece: standard cutout
Per m1: dagkant treatment
Per piece: anchor insert (if not included in m1 rate)
Per load: transport

Includes: production, curing, QC, CE, lifting anchors, standard cast-in inserts.
Surcharges: non-standard length, special finish/colour, engineering costs, small order.
overrides.ch6_exclusionItems:
- Erection/installation of plinths
- Foundation works and setting-out
- Crane and lifting equipment
- Grouting and bedding mortar
- Joint sealant between plinths
- Waterproofing at plinth base
- Backfill against plinth
- VAT
overrides.ch7_requiredDocuments:
1. Price schedule (per m1 per type, per piece accessories)
2. Product data sheets (PLIBE / PLISAFESI)
3. DoP + CE marking documentation
4. Concrete mix design and exposure class confirmation
5. Fire classification report (EN 13501-2)
6. Anchor load tables and compatibility confirmation
7. Maximum transportable piece dimensions and weight
8. Lead time after approved shop drawings
9. General terms and conditions
10. All deviations and assumptions with justification
